name: Meatball Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C).
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Shape the mixture into 1-inch meatballs.
4. Place the meatballs on ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes, or until browned.
6. Remove immediately and drain on paper towels.
7. When cooled, transfer about 30 meatballs to five 1-quart containers, leaving 1/2-inch space at the top.
8. Seal and label the containers.
9. Freeze. Use within 3 months. Makes about 144 meatballs.
